script.arcTitle: Brazil and Japan: The Late Turnaround
script.openingLine: Brazil meet Japan in the round of 32 at Houston Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Brazil meet Japan in the round of 32 at Houston Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with Brazil and Japan meeting in the round of 32.

moments.spokenLine: Kaishu SANO is shown a card for Japan.
moments.explainer: Japan receive the first recorded card of the match.

moments.spokenLine: CASEMIRO is shown a card for Brazil.
moments.explainer: Brazil are now also on the disciplinary record.

moments.spokenLine: Kaishu SANO scores for Japan, moving the verified score to 0–1.
moments.explainer: Japan take the lead, changing the match from level to Brazil trailing.

moments.spokenLine: Daichi KAMADA is shown a card for Japan.
moments.explainer: Japan add another card before the interval.
Japan carry their lead into half-time.

moments.spokenLine: DANILO is shown a card for Brazil.
moments.explainer: Brazil receive another card early in the second half.

moments.spokenLine: CASEMIRO scores for Brazil, moving the verified score to 1–1.
moments.explainer: Brazil draw level, bringing the match back to an even score.

moments.spokenLine: Junnosuke SUZUKI is shown a card for Japan.
moments.explainer: Japan receive another card as the match moves toward its decisive stage.

moments.spokenLine: GABRIEL MARTINELLI scores for Brazil, moving the verified score to 2–1.
moments.explainer: Brazil go in front late, turning a 0–1 deficit into a 2–1 lead.
Brazil complete the comeback and finish ahead of Japan.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Brazil meet Japan in the round of 32 at Houston Stadium.
In the 12th minute, Kaishu SANO is shown a card for Japan.
In the 14th minute, CASEMIRO is shown a card for Brazil.
In the 29th minute, Kaishu SANO scores for Japan, moving the verified score to 0–1.
In the 45th minute, Daichi KAMADA is shown a card for Japan.
In the 48th minute, DANILO is shown a card for Brazil.
In the 56th minute, CASEMIRO scores for Brazil, moving the verified score to 1–1.
In the 84th minute, Junnosuke SUZUKI is shown a card for Japan.
In the 5th minute of second-half stoppage time, GABRIEL MARTINELLI scores for Brazil, moving the verified score to 2–1.
